creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: closed->open

Sorry, was too quick. It's a different bug, discussed and described in 
https://bugzilla.samba.org/show_bug.cgi?id=4715 

The real solution would require changes in the FreeBSD kernel and may take 
quite a while. I'm closing this bug now, as it is connected with application 
itself, not the port. Please, add your comments and additional information 
to the bug in Samba's bugzilla. 

Thanks again for reporting this issue!
